entries.round: task:The frontend layout is visually broken and inconsistent with dark mode. 1. In 'src/app/layout.tsx', remove the dark mode hardcoding or ensure consistent bg-slate-50 dark:bg-slate-900 across the entire <body>. 2. In 'src/app/[category]/page.tsx' and 'src/app/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx', the background color is explicitly set to dark blue while the header and footer are white. Unify the background color across all pages so it flows naturally (either all white in light mode or all dark in dark mode). 3. Fix text contrast in '[category]/page.tsx' (currently dark grey text on dark blue background). Use <write_file> tags.
